validation_scope: Leave-one-UK-radar-out and blocked-time validation on the 14 July 2025 to 13 July 2026 UK VPTS archive.
interpretation: Historical UK radar reanalysis. It is not an externally absolute-density-calibrated product.
limitations: LP vector transfer remains weak away from reporting radars.
SP VID remains below the internal transfer threshold.
Nearby UK-to-Aloft comparisons are site-dependent and do not support a universal density conversion.
